description: 167 Guild Wiki — Shadow Design Tokens. Deep shadows reinforce the dark fantasy atmosphere.

sm.$description: Subtle depth for minor raised elements.

xl.$description: Top-level overlay layers and full-screen elements.

glow-gold.$description: Gold glow effect for accent elements and active states.

glow-gold-strong.$description: Strong gold glow for focus states and hero elements.

glow-crimson.$description: Crimson glow for error states and dangerous actions.

inset.$description: Inset shadow for pressed states and input wells.

inset-deep.$description: Deep inset shadow for recessed elements.
